name: libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8
title: libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8
summary: crypto helper library for with GnuTLS backend
description:
crypto helper library for with GnuTLS backend
ngtcp2 project is an implementation of QUIC protocol,
standardized in RFC 9000.
.
QUIC is a transport protocol that multiplexes stream of
data over UDP, providing low-latency, secure and reliable
connections.
.
This package contains the shared library.
.
TLS support is provided by GnuTLS.
